heroHeadline: Day 62: CIA Sovereignty Institutionalized — Sheinbaum Sends Letter to All 32 Governors; LA Times: 4 Agents, 3 Chihuahua Operations; Operativo Enjambre Edomex Sentences 1,146 Years
heroSubtitle: Day 62 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa, Jalisco (February 22, 2026). Fractura Total Day 14 (declared April 11): The El Jardinero/El Sapo vs. O3/Los Cuinis internal war remains in sustained buildup — no direct inter-faction combat confirmed in the Jalisco heartland through Day 14. 47 days to FIFA World Cup 2026 opening match (June 11, Mexico City). CIA SOVEREIGNTY CRISIS — INSTITUTIONAL ESCALATION (April 24-25): President Claudia Sheinbaum sent a formal letter to all 32 Mexican governors requiring all security cooperation with foreign agencies to route through federal channels — directly targeting opposition PAN Chihuahua Governor Maru Campos, who authorized CIA operations without federal notification. The Mexican Senate simultaneously summoned Governor Campos and AG César Jáuregui Moreno to testify. LA Times revealed four CIA agents participated in the April 20 crash operation (not two as initially reported), and this was the THIRD CIA counter-narcotics operation in Chihuahua in 2026 — with CIA officers dressed in Chihuahua State Investigative Agency uniforms. Sheinbaum: 'There are no joint operations on land or in the air.' She frames the crisis as a state-level failure ('the main failure lies with the state government') — preserving the federal bilateral framework while constraining governor-level unilateral CIA/DEA cooperation. IMPLICATION: Any state bilateral security cooperation with U.S. intelligence agencies now requires federal authorization, restructuring the governance architecture for CJNG interdiction in all 27 CJNG-active states. OPERATIVO ENJAMBRE EDOMEX (April 25): FGJEM announced 20 priority targets sentenced to 1,146 years combined — ex-Commissioner Adrián Mauricio Sánchez Mitre (190 years), ex-Mayor María Elena Martínez Robles (70 years), and 18 others with links to CJNG and La Familia Michoacana. Operativo Enjambre cumulative: 80+ arrests, 20 officials sentenced in Edomex alone. El 85 sentencing: July 31, 2026. FRACTURA TOTAL STATUS: Both factions (El Jardinero/El Sapo; O3/Los Cuinis) continue territorial buildup positioning. Critical test: whether fractura total transitions to direct heartland combat before FIFA World Cup (47 days).
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, NCTC, U.S. Treasury (OFAC), InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Wilson Center, Reuters, AP, NPR, Wall Street Journal, El País, Washington Post, CBS News, Al Jazeera, UPI, South China Morning Post, CGTN, France 24, Latin Times, Infobae México, La Silla Rota, WOLA, Milenio, Excélsior, Proceso, El Financiero, El Imparcial, Borderland Beat, RED Michoacán, Semanario ZETA, La Voz de la Frontera, TV Azteca Baja California, Time, CNN, ACLED, OCCRP, El Heraldo de México, La Razón de México, Mexico News Daily, The Yucatan Times, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: April 25, 2026.
